headline: Assessing Fortinet (FTNT) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Fortinet is on investors’ radar today Fortinet (FTNT) is drawing attention after recent share performance that includes a 2.4% move over the past day and a 7.8% gain over the past week. This has prompted fresh interest in its cybersecurity business. See our latest analysis for Fortinet. That short burst of momentum sits against a flatter picture over recent months.
